executive_summary: Global instability is trending upwards given energy vulnerability and fragile supply chains. Media panic in Taiwan relative to actual physical changes suggests a potential information warfare component. Elevated AI Bubble Index suggests capital misallocation exacerbating underlying risks.
correlations: Middle East energy spike directly impacts Global Fuel Reserves and Supply Chain Stress Score, while Taiwan Media Panic can trigger Wealth Inequality Fracture Gap as a result of geopolitical uncertainty.
